ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the student started their program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  "credits_required" INTEGER /* Total credits required to complete the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "code" TEXT /* Course code assigned by the university */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "subject_status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., Required, Elective) */,
  "ects" INTEGER /* ECTS credits for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (comma-separated course codes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C, etc.) */,
  "attendance" REAL /* Attendance percentage of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment being evaluated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with a waitlist */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was added to the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
